title: Adding a True Match to the PEP register
body_markdown:
**Title**: Updating the PEP register
**Regulation Scope**: ASIC, ASIC & GAML
**Status**: DRAFT
**Related Documents**: Screening - ComplyAdvantage, PEP Standard, ECDD procedure

Procedure for submitting a true-match PEP client for review by the AMLCO via the Assurance
platform. Periodic reviews every 12 months. Outcomes: Approved / Rejected / Pending Further
Information. Note: BO (BackOffice), Salesforce (SF), AMLCO (AML Compliance Officer),
EDD (Enhanced Due Diligence).

No table references in body.
